pace:  usning the ball hard with
their young roster. That speed :
comes at a cost, though, as the Jazz |
own the second-worst defense,
which sets up Boston for a big night.
The Celtics are a top-five offense
and should consistently find clean |
looks. The trends back it up too: the
over is 14-4 in Utah home games
and 12-7 when the Jazz are coming
off a win. This matchup strongly :
points toward a high-scoring game. | ;
